# CatSEO Pro - Robots.txt
# https://catsimage.pages.dev/robots.txt

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Allow: /cats/
Allow: /images/
Allow: /gifs/
Allow: /memes/
Allow: /wallpapers/
Allow: /breeds/
Allow: /facts/
Allow: /tags/

# Disallow API and internal routes
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_next/
Disallow: /static/
Disallow: /*.json$
Disallow: /*?_=
Disallow: /search?

# Crawl delay for rate limiting
Crawl-delay: 1

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://catsimage.pages.dev/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://catsimage.pages.dev/sitemap-cats.xml
Sitemap: https://catsimage.pages.dev/sitemap-images.xml

# Specific bot rules
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 0.5

User-agent: Googlebot-Image
Allow: /
Allow: /cats/
Allow: /images/

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: Twitterbot
Allow: /

User-agent: facebookexternalhit
Allow: /

# Block bad bots
User-agent: AhrefsBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: SemrushBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: MJ12bot
Disallow: /
